target_text: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.
original_output: The track has a clear and distinct sound that does not match any of the existing recordings in the database. It is also confirmed that the track is cleared for distribution.
final_output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required. Distribution can distribute without restrictions.
